name: Poojan Anghan
title: Software Engineer
tagline: Building Scalable Web Systems with React.js & Python
bio: I partner with founders, agile product teams, and companies to ship production-grade full-stack solutions. With deep expertise in React.js and Python (Django, FastAPI, Flask), I take projects from initial data schema design to fully containerized cloud deployments.

experience.desc: Delivering enterprise-scale software solutions using React.js and Python. Formulated microservice patterns, designed optimized SQL query layouts, and shipped fleet-management booking platforms.
Developed Django/Flask backend architectures. Integrated secure payment gateways, established multi-tenant database models, and automated manual operational structures.
